# Schoozie

> Schoozie is an all-in-one school management platform for Indian schools: professional school websites with a dynamic CMS, school ERP software (attendance, fees, payroll, transport, admissions), and dedicated parent, teacher and principal mobile apps — with multilingual parent communication (Hindi, Tamil, Bengali and more) and WhatsApp support. Get a school online in minutes.

## Products

- [School ERP](https://schoozie.com/erp.php): attendance, fees, payroll, transport, admissions, exams and reports for Indian schools.
- [School Websites & CMS](https://schoozie.com/websites.php): professional, self-manageable school websites (static or dynamic).
- [Website + ERP Combo](https://schoozie.com/combo.php): the complete digital package at a bundle discount.
- [Pricing](https://schoozie.com/pricing.php): plans and pricing in INR — transparent and all-inclusive.

## Company

- [Vision](https://schoozie.com/vision.php)
- [Contact](https://schoozie.com/contact.php): hello@schoozie.com
